name: Agora Alpha — Source Ledger
description: Provenance ledger for every text surfaced in the Agora reading room. Every entry is a public-domain edition with a stable archival URL. No copyrighted modern translations are redistributed.
freshness_policy: Catalog metadata is hand-curated. Source URLs verified at refresh time. Excerpts are static slices of the cited public-domain editions and do not change between releases.

entries.checksum_note: sha256 prefix in seed manifest: 26be... (Fragments_FullText.txt, 23822 bytes)

entries.edition: The Works of Aristotle, OUP, vol. IX, 1925

policy: Excerpts shipped in this repo are slices of public-domain editions only.
Modern copyrighted translations (Cooper, Reeve, Irwin, Crisp, Kahn, Coxon, Palmer, etc.) are never bundled.
Greek source texts: see Perseus Digital Library (Tufts).
